title: Merge PR and return to base branch
description:
## Objective
Merge the PR with --merge (not squash, not rebase — keep history visible), then check out course-main.

## Implementation
1. gh pr merge <PR#> --merge
2. git checkout course-main
3. git pull
4. Verify the merged commit shows up in git log

## Tests
git log --oneline course-main | head -5 — confirm merge commit present
Do NOT close until on course-main with the merge present.
acceptance_criteria: PR merged via --merge; local course-main has the merge
